findings.message: New write path `delete_items_by_prefix` has no span or metric instrumentation. Data-layer delete is invisible to observability monitoring.
findings.suggestion: Add OpenTelemetry span tracing and metrics instrumentation (latency, row count) around the delete operation. See how other repository functions are instrumented to match the pattern.
